steps.title: Identify the lowest value
steps.content: The question asks for the plant with the lowest average power generated per year in 2019. The data needed is in the Average power generation (MWh/yr) column.

steps.title: Match the lowest value to its state
steps.content: Wisconsin's White River plant generated 3,999 MWh per year—the lowest value in the average power generation column. The other three plants generated significantly more (Florida: 193,864; Michigan: 10,693; Indiana: 19,751). That matches choice A — A is correct.
